channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alix Earle Discusses Feud with Alex Cooper on New Netflix Series
item.description: Alix Earle has opened up about her complicated relationship with former business partner Alex Cooper on her upcoming Netflix reality series, 'Earle Meets World.' In an interview with TIME, Earle revea...

item.title: Microsoft's AI Sales Strategy: Competing with OpenAI and Anthropic
item.description: Microsoft is reportedly training its sales team to position its AI models as superior to those of OpenAI and Anthropic, according to a Bloomberg report. During an internal strategy meeting, executives...

item.title: Government Announces Civil Servants' Salary Hike and Payroll Reforms
item.description: Public Service Cabinet Secretary Geoffrey Ruku has confirmed that all civil servants in Kenya will receive a salary increase starting August 1, 2026. The adjustment covers basic salaries, commuter all...

item.title: Rassie Erasmus's Tactical Innovations Reshape International Rugby
item.description: Springboks' coach Rassie Erasmus is revolutionising international rugby through his innovative use of hybrid players, blending versatility and tactical flexibility. Utility forward Kwagga Smith, a pio...

item.title: Argentina advances to FIFA World Cup final with late comeback against England
item.description: In a dramatic FIFA World Cup semifinal on July 15, 2026, Argentina secured a 2-1 victory over England, advancing to their seventh World Cup final. Lionel Messi, the 39-year-old talisman, delivered two...

item.title: Government Urged to Integrate AI in Strategic Contracts
item.description: The article highlights the growing need for government officials to prepare for integrating artificial intelligence into strategic contracts and agreements. As AI technology rapidly reshapes public se...

item.title: Security forces thwart suicide attack on military post in Wana, killing four terrorists
item.description: Security forces successfully foiled a suicide attack on a military post in the Kari Kot area of Lower South Waziristan’s Wana on Thursday. According to sources, terrorists attempted to target the post...

item.title: Iran's Foreign Minister Visits Qatar Amid Escalating Tensions with the U.S.
item.description: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi traveled to Qatar on Wednesday to pay tribute to the late Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, the country's former emir, following his death on Sunday. The visit ...

item.title: Argentina secures dramatic 2-1 semi-final victory over England with late goal
item.description: Argentina delivered a stunning late comeback to defeat England 2-1 in a dramatic World Cup semi-final, with Lautaro Martínez's 92nd-minute header sealing the win. The match, held in Atlanta, saw Engla...

item.title: Lethbridge's Bringing Hearts Home Campaign Surpasses $30 Million Target
item.description: The Bringing Hearts Home Campaign in Lethbridge, Alberta, has successfully raised $30 million, exceeding its goal several months ahead of schedule. This achievement supports the development of a Cardi...

item.title: Katsina Governor Commits to Fair Compensation for Housing Project Affected Residents
item.description: Katsina State Governor Dikko Radda has approved ₦500 million compensation for residents impacted by the Modoji/Bakuru Federal Housing Project. The decision, made during the 11th SEC meeting, ensures f...

item.title: Ramaphosa faces legal challenges over Phala Phala inquiry
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa's legal battle against an impeachment inquiry centered on his Phala Phala farm scandal has intensified. The Western Cape High Court is considering whether the presidency can ...

item.title: Jude Bellingham and Argentina's Valentin Barco Clash After World Cup Match
item.description: The article details the incident where England midfielder Jude Bellingham was captured on camera striking Argentina's Valentin Barco following their 2-1 defeat in the 2026 FIFA World Cup semi-final. T...

item.title: Ombudsman Dismisses Case Against Former DTI Official
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman has officially withdrawn its legal case against a former Department of Trade and Industry (DTI) official, marking a significant development in ongoing investigations into a...

item.title: Senate Confirmation Hearing for Blanche Highlights Skepticism Over Trump Fund and Tax Deal
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche faced intense scrutiny during his Senate confirmation hearing as lawmakers questioned the legality and implications of a $1.776 billion fund created to compensate ...

item.title: Federal Govt Funds Tailors Under SUPA Program to Boost Skills
item.description: The Federal Government has allocated N3.6 billion to support tailors through the Skill Up Artisans Programme (SUPA) under the Industrial Training Fund. This initiative aims to strengthen Nigeria's inf...

item.title: Women Cricketers from Rural India Redefining the Game
item.description: The article highlights the struggles and triumphs of women cricketers from rural India, such as Disha Singh from Morena and Archana Devi from Uttar Pradesh, who defy societal norms to pursue cricket. ...

item.title: Wildfires in Northwestern Ontario Lead to Evacuations and Air Quality Warnings
item.description: Wildfires in northwestern Ontario have forced evacuations in several First Nation communities, including Armstrong, Collins First Nation, Lac La Croix First Nation, Lac des Mille Lacs First Nation, an...

item.title: CIPM Conducts First Virtual Induction for 78 HR Professionals, Emphasizes Innovation and Professional Excellence
item.description: The Chartered Institute of Personnel Management of Nigeria (CIPM) recently held its first-ever virtual induction ceremony, welcoming 78 new HR professionals into the profession. This landmark 71st Ind...

item.title: TMC Rebel Group Gains Support as Allegations Against Abhishek Banerjee Emerge
item.description: Kamarhati legislator Madan Mitra, a long-time aide of Mamata Banerjee, has joined the rebel faction within the Trinamool Congress (TMC), led by Ritabrata Banerjee. This move has strengthened the rebel...
